emails.subject: Re: Midway Term Sheet
emails.body: Re: Midway Term Sheet Ben, I'll take a look at it today, you night owl. Hope the kids cut you some slack after your late night. You're missing our last week of nice weather for the season. It was 65 degress this am. I'm taking Herman to the game tonight, which will be wonderful in this weather. Next comes 90 degrees. Michael had his first soccer practice yesterday actually a skills assessment to put them on teams. He loved it. His big sister and her boyfriend took him to buy soccer clothes afterwards. He is wearing his shin guards and soccer shorts to school today. Too cute. Hope you are enjoying your little ones. Kay

emails.subject: Re: Midway Term Sheet
emails.body: I'll call you today. Kay Mann@ENRON 05/22/2001 08:48 AM

emails.subject: Re: Midway Term Sheet
emails.body: I'll call you today. Kay Mann@ENRON 05/22/2001 08:48 AM
